note: Owen Henne (INF), a top portal signee, was drafted by the Cardinals (6th rd) — awaiting his decision (deadline Jul 27).
Armani Guzman withdrew from the MLB Draft and announced his return to WVU — a big lift for the 2027 infield.
Kyle Casteel (RHP), an incoming signee, was drafted by the White Sox (11th rd) — a possible loss to the 2026 class if he signs pro.
Kyle Casteel signed with the White Sox (11th rd), forgoing his WVU career — the possible loss is now confirmed.
